overview.title: ✅ OVERVIEW
items: This tab checks the quality of mod translations
Detects errors, warnings, and issues
Supports partial and full verification
Results can be exported to TXT, JSON, HTML

settings.title: ⚙️ SETTINGS
items: Report format — TXT, JSON, or HTML
Translation check — analyzes XML files
Dependency check — analyzes modDependencies
Conflict detection — searches for conflicting mods
Verification language — select language to verify
Language integrity filtering — only verify files of the selected language

verification.title: 🔍 VERIFICATION TYPES
items: Mod verification — quick check of selected mods
Full check — deep analysis of all mods
XML integrity check — validates structure correctness
Translation check — checks presence and completeness of Russian/Languages

results.title: 📊 RESULTS
items: ❌ Errors — critical issues that require fixing
⚠️ Warnings — potential issues
✅ Success — verified successfully
ℹ️ Info — reference data

filters.title: 📝 RESULT FILTERS
items: Search — filter by text
Show errors — toggle errors on/off
Show warnings — toggle warnings on/off
Show info — toggle informational entries on/off

export.title: 📤 EXPORT
items: TXT export — plain text report
JSON export — machine-readable format
HTML export — formatted report for browsers
All formats preserve the full results structure

tips.title: 💡 TIPS
items: Run verification after every translation
Fix errors before publishing your mod
Use full verification for quality audits
Export reports to send to developers
Pay attention to warnings — they can turn into errors
